mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.real_name as realName FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE r.role_code IN ('sales', 'sales_manager') AND r.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 AND u.is_deleted = 0
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
ORDER BY u.real_name
SELECT u.id, u.real_name as realName FROM sys_user u WHERE u.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.status = 1 AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.real_name
